{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Assemblymember Al Muratsuchi secured $10 million in additional funding for the Southern California Regional Occupational Center (SoCal ROC).",
    "SoCal ROC is an award-winning career technical education program.",
    "The additional funding will ensure that SoCal ROC continues to provide high-quality career technical education and teach valuable job skills to students.",
    "The California Department of Finance certified that SoCal ROC’s financial plan for the next four years was stable.",
